data.body: PASS-1 review note (E4 — assumption/premise verification). Recording for traceability; structured findings follow in the review payload. Verified against src/rebar/_commands/init.py, src/rebar/_engine/rebar_reconciler/_advisory_lock.py, src/rebar/_engine/rebar_reconciler/binding_store.py, src/rebar/_engine/rebar_reconciler/reconcile.py, and src/rebar/_store/push.py. Most codebase assertions hold; two need the author's attention (the "rewritten each reconcile pass" cadence for bindings.json, and the "committed at the branch root" framing given binding_store writes under `.tickets-tracker/.bridge_state/`).
